response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership or distributed systems architecture at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and dev practices
Active open-source contributions and infrastructure tooling experience
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (LabWindows/CVI), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrated experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
